title: rubus hirtus var. oblongulus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. oblongulus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan thimbleberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. oblongulus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
